home.p1: {name} is part of a suite of technologies under development by Stego Research to provide intelligent data insights to gamers, creators, tournament organizers, game developers, and more.
home.p2: We are taking advanced data extraction and processing techniques previously only available to major companies to provide insights into player behavior, game performance, and tournament outcomes to everyone.
home.p3: {name} is currently available by special invitation only. Check back soon for more information.

footer.discordBotProtection: Please click the button below to join our Discord server. In order to protect our community from bots, some users may be prompted to solve a captcha challenge.
footer.joinChallengeError: The bot-protection challenge failed to load. Please try again.
footer.joinError: Failed to join Discord. Please try again.

faq.title: {name} Technical Preview FAQ
faq.a1: {name} is a platform designed for managing and analyzing game replays. It allows you to upload your replays, view detailed statistics and insights, and search through a collection of games.
faq.q2: What kind of replays does {name} support?
faq.a2: Currently, {name} only supports 1v1 StarCraft II replays from Legacy of the Void (ver. 5.0.0 and newer)
faq.a3_1: I won't bury the lede: There will be paid options in the future. However, we hope to keep all of the core functionality that you see today in the preview phase free to use. Some of the most advanced features not yet available, as well as the ability to keep certain replays private, may be available only to paid users in the future. The reality is that the platform costs quite a bit to operate and took many moons to build, and we would rather not just rely on donations.
faq.a3_2: We hope you enjoy the free features, and that you find the paid features well worth their cost when they arrive.
faq.q4: How do I use {name}? Do I need an account?
faq.a4: Yes, currently an account is required for any use of the {name} platform. Once you've been invited to join, you can upload your game replays, view their analyses, and explore all of the replays in our extensive data set.
faq.q5: How do I sign up for an account?
faq.a5: Right now, invites are going out on a very limited basis. We will have a semi-open alpha soon where you can register your interest, so stay tuned.
faq.q6: Can I keep my replays private?
faq.a6: During this preview phase, all replays you upload will be publicly searchable and analyzed. In the future, we will introduce more granular privacy options for users, allowing you to control who can view your replays.
faq.q7: What kind of analysis does {name} provide?
faq.a7: The short answer is, a lot - and way more is coming after this preview window. {name} can nearly instantly extract and analyze replays to provide insights on build orders, spending, benchmark data, and player performance. We want to give players, fans, and coaches next-level data analysis that will blow your mind.
faq.q8: Can I download replays? What about replay packs?
faq.a8: You can download any publicly available replay file, or any file you are linked to. Replay packs and sets are coming soon.
faq.q9: What should I expect from this preview version of {name}?
faq.a9_p1: This is a very early version of {name}, and it is absolutely broken in a number of ways. Please keep this in mind:
faq.a9_li1: You may encounter bugs, unexpected behavior, or crashes.
faq.a9_li2: Data (including your uploaded replays or analysis results) may go missing or change unexpectedly.
faq.a9_li3: The platform is not expected to be 100% reliable or accurate. We appreciate your understanding and patience as we work to improve the platform! Your feedback during this phase is invaluable.
faq.q10: Where do I share feedback or questions?
faq.a10: Stay tuned for the launch of our Discord server and our public issue tracker once the beta is released.
faq.a11: We want to launch in multiple languages, so stay tuned. If you speak Spanish, Chinese, or Korean we could use your help with translations, so please keep in touch.
faq.a12: Coming whenever I can make it look less bad.

replays.noDownloadTooltip: This replay cannot be downloaded due to owner or administrator request
replays.mapTooltip: Map names may be localized in some situations.
replays.playersTooltip: All names are directly loaded from replay data unless the Battle.net account has been linked to a player.
replays.placeholder: You can search by player name, map name, race, and more

missingPlayerProfile.title: Missing Player Profile
missingPlayerProfile.body: To unlock full account functionality, please connect a player profile. You can create a new profile here. If a profile already exists for you, navigate to that page instead and click "Claim Account."
missingPlayerProfile.invalidCountry: Country must be a 2-letter ISO code.

upload.instructions: You can select up to 200 SC2Replay files to upload with the button above.{zipInfo} You can also upload files by dragging them directly onto this page.
upload.zipInfo: Admins may also upload a .zip archive containing SC2Replay files.
upload.warning: NOTE: During the technical preview, all uploaded replays will be visible to all users!
upload.privacyHint: By uploading files you acknowledge and agree to the terms outlined in our {link} (opens in new tab).

replay_page.saltCopyFailed: Failed to copy SALT build order
replay_page.favoriteRequiresAccount: An account is required to favorite replays
replay_page.addToPackRequiresAccount: An account is required to add replays to a pack

report.title: Report Profile
report.modalBody: Please provide a reason for reporting this profile (e.g. offensive name, misinformation).

player_page.searchTooltip: Tip: try a handle (e.g. Serral), real name (e.g. Joona), a 2–3 letter country code (US, KOR), or an exact ID number.

claim.title: Profile Claim
claim.alreadyLinkedElsewhere: Your account is already linked to another player profile.
claim.alreadyLinked: This player profile is already linked to an account.
claim.requestSubmitted: Claim request submitted. An administrator will review your request.
claim.modalBody1: Are you sure you want to claim this player profile as yours?
claim.modalBody2: Your request must be approved by an administrator.
claim.modalBody2b: Intentionally submitting fraudulent requests will result in your account being banned.
claim.modalBody3: If approved, this player profile will permanently become your user profile page. You will not be able to claim any other player pages.
claim.modalBody4: Changing your associated player will require contacting support.
claim.submit: I have read the above carefully - Submit

consent.title: Diagnostics consent
consent.text: Please consider helping Stego Research LLC (the developers of {name}) to improve the product by providing error reports and debug information using Sentry.io. See {link} (opens in new window) to review our policy.
